name: native-update-docs
description: Public documentation site for the native-update Capacitor plugin (https://www.npmjs.com/package/native-update). Built with Docusaurus, deployed to GitHub Pages via GitHub Actions.

scripts.sync:from-plugin:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');const v=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('../native-update/package.json','utf8')).version;fs.writeFileSync('plugin-version.json',JSON.stringify({version:v},null,2)+'
');const fm=(t,d,p)=>'---
title: '+t+'
description: '+d+'
sidebar_position: '+p+'
mdx:
  format: md
---

';const guide=fs.readFileSync('../native-update/AI-INTEGRATION-GUIDE.md','utf8').replace(/^# .*
/,'');fs.writeFileSync('docs/ai-integration.md',fm('AI Integration Guide','Quick reference for AI development agents integrating native-update.',9)+guide);const ch=fs.readFileSync('../native-update/docs/CHANGELOG.md','utf8').replace(/^# .*
/,'').replace(/\(\./MIGRATION\.md[^)]*\)/g,'(https://unpkg.com/native-update/docs/MIGRATION.md)');fs.writeFileSync('docs/changelog.md',fm('Changelog','Release history for the native-update plugin.',10)+ch);const lf='static/llms-full.txt';fs.writeFileSync(lf,fs.readFileSync(lf,'utf8').replace(/\| Current version \| [^|]+ \|/,'| Current version | '+v+' |'));console.log('synced plugin-version.json + ai-integration.md + changelog.md + llms-full version ('+v+')');" && yarn sync:raw
scripts.sync:raw:
node -e "const fs=require('fs');fs.mkdirSync('static/raw',{recursive:true});const S=[['docs/public-api/overview.md','public-api-overview'],['docs/public-api/endpoints.md','public-api-endpoints'],['docs/public-api/async-jobs.md','public-api-async-jobs'],['docs/ai-integration.md','ai-integration'],['docs/changelog.md','changelog']];const M=[];for(const [src,name] of S){const t=fs.readFileSync(src,'utf8');let title=name,body=t;if(t.startsWith('---')){const end=t.indexOf('
---',3);if(end>=0){const fm=t.slice(3,end);const after=t.indexOf('
',end+1);body=t.slice(after+1);while(body.startsWith('
'))body=body.slice(1);const tl=fm.split('
').find(l=>l.startsWith('title:'));if(tl)title=tl.slice(6).trim();}}fs.writeFileSync('static/raw/'+name+'.md',body);M.push({name:name,path:'/raw/'+name+'.md',title:title,bytes:Buffer.byteLength(body)});}fs.writeFileSync('static/raw/manifest.json',JSON.stringify(M,null,2)+'
');console.log('synced static/raw/ ('+M.length+' files) + manifest.json');"
